messages.content:
Translate to English

"涼嶺(すずね) コカコーラオタク"
"Suzune, Coca-Cola enthusiast"

Translate to English

"リンちゃん！！！！！
机の上に座っちゃいけません！！！！！！！"
"Rin-chan!!!! You can't sit on the desk!!!!!"

Translate to English

"ここがちょっとﾑﾆｯてなってるのがえっち"
"That part being slightly raised is exciting (erotic)"

Translate to English

"鏡音リン着ぐるみ"
"Kagamine Rin mascot costume"

Translate to Japanese

"Miku mascot costume"
"ミクのマスコット衣装" (Miku no masukotto ishou)

Translate to English

"初めての着ぐるみオフ会から一週間経ちました
あの時間は本当に楽しくて、着ぐるみの皆さんとってもかわいかったです
那智さん：彩弧由貴さん（@saiko_yuki）、飛龍さん：しこねーさん（@HiRyUuDx03）、鏡音リンちゃん：涼嶺さん（@Suzune_gic）、雪風ちゃん：るーとんさん（@kig_root）"

"A week has passed since the first mascot costume meetup. That time was really fun, and all the mascot costumes were really cute. Nachi: Saiko Yuki (@saiko_yuki), Hiryu: Shikone (@HiRyUuDx03), Kagamine Rin-chan: Suzune (@Suzune_gic), Yukikaze-chan: Root (@kig_root)"
"涼嶺さん 着ぐるみ"
"Suzune-san mascot costume"

Translate to English

"鏡音リンちゃん 着ぐるみ"
"Kagamine Rin-chan mascot costume"

Translate to English

"The Moon is really cheap :("
This expression doesn't make sense in English. However, if a context is added, it may be possible to provide an accurate translation.

Translate to Japanese

“The Moon is really cheap :(”

「月はとても安いです :( 」 (Tsuki wa totemo yasui desu :( ) 

Note: This phrase doesn't make sense in Japanese either.

Translate to Japanese

"St. Lucia"
"聖ルチア" (Sei Ruchia)

Translate to English

"聖ルチア 着ぐるみ:
"Saint Lucia mascot costume:"

Translate to Taiwanese Mandarin

"mascot costumes"
吉祥物服裝 (jíxiáng mù fúzhuāng)

Translate to English

"中視 縱橫天下"
"CTS (Chinese Television System) - Cross-strait and international news coverage"

Translate to English

"예쁜 인형 탈쓰고 안녕!"
"Goodbye with a pretty doll hat on!"

Translate to English

"어린이날 극한인형탈알바체험 feat.삐삐핵인싸등극"

"Eorini nal geu-han-inhyeong-tal-a-ral-ba-chae-hoe-m feat. Ppippi haek-inssa-deung-geuk" 

Note: the text is written in Korean (Hangul), not in English. The phonetic translation to English is "Human of Eorini wearing a prisoner's uniform feat. Ppippi hacker or imitator pretender." However, this doesn't convey a clear meaning. Without more context, it's difficult to provide an accurate translation.
